creator: takhus@takhus.mind.net
text:

>    192.168.1 instead of 192.168.1.0
>    perhaps it's normal....

>    'netstat -rn' I dont have the complete route.
>    I've
>    192.168.1 instead of 192.168.1.0
>    perhaps it's normal....


I believe that this is a normal output result (do to conversion
through inet_netof(3), perhaps?).

Tony.
